name: IRC_SGAS_ENTRIES
description: This table stores non-transactional data normally related to user interactions.

columns.Name: ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the entity associated with the entry.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_AUX
columns.Comments: Auxiliary reference to the entity associated with the entry.

columns.Name: CONTEXT
columns.Comments: Context where the content was generated.

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of content. JSON content is stored in CONTENT_JSON while non-JSON in CONTENT.

columns.Name: CONTENT_JSON
columns.Comments: JSON content. The column configuration optimzes access to JSON content.

columns.Name: CONTENT
columns.Comments: Non-JSON content. The type of the content is defined by CONTENT_TYPE.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
